title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 44.113 - Political activity by emergency management organizations prohibited
text:
44.113.  Political activity by emergency management organizations prohibited. — No organization for emergency management established pursuant to sections 44.010 to 44.130 shall participate in any form of political activity, nor shall it be used directly or indirectly for political purposes.
(L. 1967 p. 122 § 6, A.L. 1998 S.B. 743)
